description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Ubuntu armv7 that triggers on push events. Run a job named build-ubuntu with a matrix strategy for armv7 architecture on ubuntu_latest distribution. The job should check out the repository, determine the current branch name, and then use the run-on-arch-action to perform a build on the specified architecture and distribution. Install necessary dependencies, configure environment variables, clone a repository, checkout the branch, and execute a build with cmake. Optionally, execute unit tests.
